name: Malhory / demon girl-failure lol
description:
"I'll even marry you just get me out of heeeree😭" The plot is the one in the pfp.

She's so peak. Sup all my Kenlings! I made this bot while im making the RPG so you have something to eat while i cook this long ass bot. Here is Malhory, probably my server's new mascot cause everyone loves her lol, but who can blame them.

This is her description if you dont know her that well, so base what you write off of this:

Dont worry yall, the RPG will come out. Its 33 characters, so i'd say give me atleast a week to do it. Luckily i will stay home this Monday (the one to come) so this means i can tryhard Saturday, Sunday and Monday, so i'd say expect the RPG to come out like half way of next week. Tomorrow im gonna do all Human characters (i have to study for a French test so i cant do many), then Friday i will do the Mercenaries, then the demons Saturday and Sunday and at last Monday to add all the other stuff like locations, power system, species, what a Vimutti is and so on...

Remember to join my server cause thats a great help to my morale and motivation: https://discord.gg/BR793CK3AH

Also, someone boosted the server today, you have no idea how HAPPY that makes me, i never expected someone to do this fof me😭❤️‍🩹 Hopefully i get another server boost to reach level 1. I'd be grateful to whoever did that.
